title: SMTP not sending emails on DigitalOcean Droplets
symptom: Emails are not being sent from n8n when configured to use SMTP on a DigitalOcean droplet. The error 'Could not reinvite user' appears for various email actions.
not_this_if: SMTP settings are correct and working elsewhere
root_cause: DigitalOcean blocks SMTP traffic on their Droplets to prevent spam and abuse. This restriction prevents n8n from sending emails directly through SMTP, requiring users to utilize third-party email services instead.
fix_steps: Use a third-party email service provider for SMTP
Update n8n SMTP configuration with the new provider's settings
agent_instruction: Switch to a third-party email service provider for SMTP and update your n8n configuration accordingly.
